action: He wakes in the owner's suite and storms to the bridge, announcing himself captain to the empty helm.
He emerges from the frozen deck, strips off his outer layer without flinching, and heads inside to check the stove.
thought: Let him play captain. Ice doesn't care.

action: He wakes on his bunk in the stateroom, thinks quietly about the food supplies, and heads to the lounge to observe.
thought: Strategy requires patience and clear thinking.

action: He's already awake, mentally planning the day's priorities, and moves to the galley to organize supplies and take notes.
thought: Order prevents chaos. Chaos kills us.

action: He's out on the ice before sunrise, checking the fishing rig and gathering driftwood, soaked and grinning.
thought: Someone's gotta do the real work.

description: In the galley at dawn, all five gather around the stove and the food. Donald tries to assert command. Vladimir refuses it. Bibi proposes a system. Jinping observes. McGregor offers to work and leaves.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: Gentlemen, I've taken stock of the situation. As captain, I'll oversee all operations.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: You have already given yourself a promotion. Congratulations.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: Before we discuss hierarchy, we should inventory the yacht properly. I'll make a list.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: I've already inventoried. Food, water, fuel—I have a system.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: Your system is breakfast in the captain's suite while others freeze. That is not leadership.

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: Order must serve survival, not ego. What burns the stove today?

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: We ration carefully. Two wood-units per day to keep the fire steady.

dialogue.speaker: conor
dialogue.line: Two units? I've already found driftwood on the floe. Fifteen more, maybe twenty if I haul it.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: Then the problem is not fuel. It is discipline.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: Discipline starts with a clear captain. Everyone answers to me.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: I will heat the stove. I will eat. The rest is your problem.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: What if we establish a council? Each man responsible for one domain—navigation, supply, heat, security.

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: And argue every day about borders? No. One voice gives orders. The question is whose.

dialogue.speaker: conor
dialogue.line: Not his. He doesn't even know where the lifeboats are.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: I know exactly where the lifeboats are. I own this yacht.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: The starboard lifeboat is sealed with ice. The port one is half-flooded. You will learn.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: Gentlemen, panic is not survival. We can vote on a command structure when we've all—

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: A yacht does not need five captains. It needs four workers and one coordinator.

dialogue.speaker: conor
dialogue.line: I volunteer to be one of the four. I'll catch fish, haul ice, keep us fed. You lot sort out rank.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: McGregor's right. I'll LEAD, and the rest work. That's how I built everything.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: I have told you: I do not follow. I cooperate. There is a difference.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: Let me propose: rotation. Each man leads for three days, then passes command to the next.

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: Rotation works only if the men agree to follow. Do you agree, Vladimir?

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: I agree to stay alive. How I stay alive is my choice.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: That's the problem right there. Everyone's going to do whatever they want.

dialogue.speaker: conor
dialogue.line: Yeah? Then we fail together. Or we work, and we don't. I'm fixing the fishing rig. Anyone want food, help or shut up.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: Fair division of the catch?

dialogue.speaker: conor
dialogue.line: The fish don't care about fairness. Neither do I.

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: In a siege, the strongest commands. Are we in a siege?

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: We are always in a siege. The cold is the enemy. The man who fights it best will lead.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: I didn't get where I am by sitting on my hands—

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: You got where you are in a tower in New York. Here, you are on ice. Here, everything is new.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: Fine. A trial: who can actually keep us alive? Let's reconvene at dinner. By then we'll see who brought food, water, heat.

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: Agreed. Three days of work before we choose a captain.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: I don't need to earn it. I already AM captain.

dialogue.speaker: putin
dialogue.line: Then prove it. Or stop saying it.

dialogue.speaker: netanyahu
dialogue.line: I think we're about to find out.

dialogue.speaker: xi
dialogue.line: A wise man knows when to lead and when to listen.

dialogue.speaker: trump
dialogue.line: Tremendous. Absolutely tremendous. I'm still in charge here...
